---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new input, comment field, or behaviour.
title: "feat: <one-line summary>"
labels: enhancement
---

## What you want

_The capability you'd like. Be concrete._

## Why

_The problem this solves. Who benefits and when._

## Alternatives considered

_What you've tried, or why a workflow-level workaround isn't enough._

## Scope check

- [ ] This affects what consumers see in PR comments (i.e. user-facing).
- [ ] This is a vendored-scorer change that should land upstream in [`agent-friendly-code`](https://github.com/hsnice16/agent-friendly-code) first.
- [ ] This is action-runtime only (inputs, comment shape, fallback behaviour).
